name: Spanish Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream the cheese, 1 tbsp of butter, and sugar together without beating.
3. Stir in the eggs one at a time, making sure to beat well after each addition.
4. Add the cinnamon, lemon rind, flour, and salt; blend until combined.
5. Butter the pan with the remaining 2 tbsp of butter using your fingers to spread it evenly.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 12 minutes at 400 degrees F.
7. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees F and continue baking for another 25 to 30 minutes, until a knife inserted comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool to room temperature before sprinkling with confectioners' sugar.
